title: Pojav+
description: Ultra lightweight PojavLauncher modpack with maximum FPS and smooth PvP experience. Designed for low-end mobile devices.
body:
Pojav+ is a lightweight and highly optimized Minecraft modpack designed for smooth gameplay on mobile devices using PojavLauncher.

This pack is focused on maximum performance, low RAM usage, and a clean PvP experience without unnecessary features.

Whether you play on a low-end phone or a powerful device, this modpack ensures stable FPS and minimal lag.

🚀 Features:

✔ Massive FPS boost
✔ Optimized for low-end mobile devices
✔ Smooth and responsive PvP gameplay
✔ Clean UI and useful HUD improvements
✔ Minimal lag and fast loading times
